doc":{"details":"Provably fair flip game using VRF for randomness.      Gas optimisation - two-phase resolution:        Phase 1  flipCoin()           - burns tokens, requests VRF        Phase 2  fulfillRandomWords() - stores random word, sets flag (~25k gas)        Phase 3  resolveGame()        - computes result, mints payout, updates history      fulfillRandomWords is kept deliberately minimal so it always fits      inside the VRF callback gas limit regardless of bet history depth.      resolveGame can be called by the player, a keeper, or any address.","errors":{"EnforcedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is paused."}],"ExpectedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is not paused."}],"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}]},"events":{"Paused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`."},"Unpaused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`."}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"canStartNewGame(address)":{"params":{"player":"Player address"}},"constructor":{"params":{"_callbackGasLimit":"Gas limit for the VRF callback (kept low - callback is now minimal)","_gamaTokenAddress":"Address of the GAMA token contract","_numWords":"Number of random words to request (must be 1)","_requestConfirmations":"Number of block confirmations required by VRF","keyHash":"VRF key hash for the network","subscriptionId":"VRF subscription ID","vrfCoordinator":"Address of the VRF coordinator"}},"flipCoin(uint8,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Token amount to bet (burned immediately)","chosenSide":"Side to bet on (1 = HEADS, 2 = TAILS)"},"returns":{"requestId":" VRF request identifier"}},"forceStopGame(address)":{"params":{"player":"Player address"}},"getBetHistory(address)":{"params":{"player":"Player address"}},"getGameStatus(address)":{"params":{"player":"Player address"}},"getPlayerForRequest(uint256)":{"params":{"requestId":"VRF request ID"}},"getUserData(address)":{"params":{"player":"Player address"}},"hasPendingRequest(address)":{"params":{"player":"Player address"}},"hasPendingResolution(address)":{"params":{"player":"Player address"}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"resolveGame(address)":{"params":{"player":"Address of the player whose pending game should be resolved"}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."}},"title":"Flip","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"canStartNewGame(address)":{"notice":"Return true if the player can start a new game."},"constructor":{"notice":"Contract constructor"},"flipCoin(uint8,uint256)":{"notice":"Place a bet on a flip (heads or tails)."},"forceStopGame(address)":{"notice":"Owner-only: force-stop a stuck game and refund the player."},"getActivePlayers(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Get a paginated list of active players for automation/keepers."},"getBetHistory(address)":{"notice":"Get a player's bet history (newest first, up to MAX_HISTORY_SIZE)."},"getGameStatus(address)":{"notice":"Comprehensive game status for a player."},"getPlayerForRequest(uint256)":{"notice":"Get the player address associated with a VRF request ID."},"getUserData(address)":{"notice":"Get a player's current game state and last-played timestamp."},"getVrfConfig()":{"notice":"Get current VRF configuration"},"hasPendingRequest(address)":{"notice":"Return true if the player has an active game with a pending VRF request,         OR if VRF has responded and resolveGame() hasn't been called yet."},"hasPendingResolution(address)":{"notice":"Return true if a player has a result ready and is waiting for resolveGame()."},"pause()":{"notice":"Pause contract operations"},"recoverOwnStuckGame()":{"notice":"Recover from a stuck game (VRF never responded) and receive a refund. 2049bbecf632ca876224dd4b2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6a708e8a5bdb1011c2c381c9a5cfd8a9a956d7d0a9dc1bd8bcdaf52f76ef2f12","dweb:/ipfs/Qmax9WHBnVsZP46ZxEMNRQpLQnrdE4dK8LehML1Py8FowF"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Pausable.sol":{"keccak256":"0xdb484371dfbb848cb6f5d70464e9ac9b2900e4164ead76bbce4fef0b44bcc68f","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f9d6f6f6600a2bec622f699081b58350873b5e63ce05464d17d674a290bb8a7c","dweb:/ipfs/QmQKVzSQY1PM3Bid4QhgVVZyx6B4Jx7XgaQzLKHj38vJz8"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol":{"keccak256":"0x11a5a79827df29e915a12740caf62fe21ebe27c08c9ae3e09abe9ee3ba3866d3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://3cf0c69ab827e3251db9ee6a50647d62c90ba580a4d7bbff21f2bea39e7b2f4a","dweb:/ipfs/QmZiKwtKU1SBX4RGfQtY7PZfiapbbu6SZ9vizGQD9UHjRA"]},"src/Flip.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd386cf6fc24ec57fd77ba23d9dde1b54c0a7496806fefb46119bcf66a05eba18","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://3d8484c928ad9099a561ffde95ea6f0a2ae30e97de3b192aaeb01d48e9e9c707","dweb:/ipfs/QmTg8vkCYuKN9rgUeTTvyyy53xU97kWwXR85ZGdpgnRwxf"]}},"version":1}

params._callbackGasLimit: Gas limit for the VRF callback (kept low - callback is now minimal)
params._gamaTokenAddress: Address of the GAMA token contract
params._numWords: Number of random words to request (must be 1)
params._requestConfirmations: Number of block confirmations required by VRF
params.keyHash: VRF key hash for the network

params.chosenSide: Side to bet on (1 = HEADS, 2 = TAILS)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.player: Address of the player whose pending game should be resolved

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

canStartNewGame(address).notice: Return true if the player can start a new game.

flipCoin(uint8,uint256).notice: Place a bet on a flip (heads or tails).

forceStopGame(address).notice: Owner-only: force-stop a stuck game and refund the player.

getActivePlayers(uint256,uint256).notice: Get a paginated list of active players for automation/keepers.

getBetHistory(address).notice: Get a player's bet history (newest first, up to MAX_HISTORY_SIZE).

getGameStatus(address).notice: Comprehensive game status for a player.

getPlayerForRequest(uint256).notice: Get the player address associated with a VRF request ID.

getUserData(address).notice: Get a player's current game state and last-played timestamp.

hasPendingRequest(address).notice: Return true if the player has an active game with a pending VRF request,         OR if VRF has responded and resolveGame() hasn't been called yet.

hasPendingResolution(address).notice: Return true if a player has a result ready and is waiting for resolveGame().

recoverOwnStuckGame().notice: Recover from a stuck game (VRF never responded) and receive a refund.         Requires both the block threshold and the time timeout to have passed,         and that the VRF request still exists (i.e. was never fulfilled).

resolveGame(address).notice: Finalise a game after the VRF callback has responded.         This function performs all the work that previously lived in         fulfillRandomWords: result calculation, payout minting, history         update, and counter increments. The gas cost is borne by the         caller (player, keeper, or any address) rather than the VRF         subscription.         Anyone may call this on behalf of any player, enabling a keeper         pattern without requiring the player to be online.

setVrfCallbackGasLimit(uint32).notice: Update callback gas limit for VRF (owner only)

setVrfNumWords(uint8).notice: Update number of random words requested from VRF (owner only)
